name: Ransomware IOCs Detected on Multiple Machines
notes: This rule triggers when a ransomware IOC is detected on five or more different machines. This could indicate the ransomware is successfully spreading in the network.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Custom Rule Engine

when the event matches QIDNAME(qid) IN ('Ransomware Decryption Instructions File Created', 'Ransomware File Extension Detected', 'BadRabbit IOC Detected', 'Maze IOC Detected', 'Maze IOC Detected - File Exfiltration', 'Petya / NotPetya IOC Detected', 'REvil IOC Detected', 'WCry IOC Detected', 'Suspicious Amount of Files Renamed on the Same Machine', 'Excessive File Deletion and Creation', 'Suspicious Amount of Files Deleted on the Same Machine', 'Ryuk Process Terminated', 'Ryuk IOC Detected', 'Malware as a Service Behaviour', 'Malware as a Service Hash IOC Detected') AQL filter query
when at least 5 events are seen with the same QID and different Source Address in 1 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 5 events are seen with the same QID and different Source Address in 1 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY Ransomware IOCs Detected on Multiple Machines on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Custom Rule Engine

AND when the event matches QIDNAME(qid) IN ('Ransomware Decryption Instructions File Created', 'Ransomware File Extension Detected', 'BadRabbit IOC Detected', 'Maze IOC Detected', 'Maze IOC Detected - File Exfiltration', 'Petya / NotPetya IOC Detected', 'REvil IOC Detected', 'WCry IOC Detected', 'Suspicious Amount of Files Renamed on the Same Machine', 'Excessive File Deletion and Creation', 'Suspicious Amount of Files Deleted on the Same Machine', 'Ryuk Process Terminated', 'Ryuk IOC Detected', 'Malware as a Service Behaviour', 'Malware as a Service Hash IOC Detected') AQL filter query
AND when at least 5 events are seen with the same QID and different Source Address in 1 hour(s)
RED_list: Event name: Ransomware IOC Detected on Multiple Machines
Event description: A ransomware IOC has been detected on multiple machines.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
